records.raw_text: David E. Keller
Minutes of the Metropolitan Transportation Authority Finance Committee Meeting 2 Broadway, 20th Floor Board Room New York, NY 10004 Monday March 24, 2025 12:45 p.m.

records.display_name: Congestion Pricing February net operating revenue
records.raw_text: There was $9.5 million of Operating Expenses plus $2 million for mitigation accrual, bringing total expenses to $11.5 million, with Net Operating Revenues of $40.4 million.
For the month of February, the estimated Revenue is $51.9 million, representing 27 days of collections.
Subway farebox revenue was $9 million favorable
Farebox revenue was $17 million favorable, but toll revenue was $2 million unfavorable.

records.display_name: February debt service expense unfavorable variance
records.raw_text: Debt service Expense was $2 million unfavorable.
LIRR was $7 million favorable

payload.description: Fares Not Collected rate

records.raw_text: Fares Not Collected on LIRR was 2.3% in February, improved from 4.3% in January and from 6.6% last February.
MNR was $2 million favorable.
Labor expenses were $7 million unfavorable; outside of timing-related impacts, Payroll was favorable by $29 million while Overtime was unfavorable by $45 million
toll revenue was $2 million unfavorable
Operating subsidies were $76 million favorable, with just over half timing related.

payload.description: Fares Not Collected rate

records.raw_text: Fares Not Collected on MNR was 2.2% in February, improved from 3.4% in January and down from 2.9% last February.

payload.description: Fares Not Collected rate

records.raw_text: Fares Not Collected on MNR was 2.2% in February, improved from 3.4% in January

payload.description: Fares Not Collected rate

records.raw_text: from 6.6% last February

records.display_name: Congestion Pricing revenue share - passenger vehicles
records.raw_text: 66% was from passenger vehicles, 24% from for-hire vehicles and taxis, and 1% from buses and motorcycles.
Overall, February operating results were $174 million favorable, about 45 percent due to favorable operating subsidy results.

records.display_name: February NYCT Bus and MTA Bus farebox revenue variance
records.raw_text: combined NYCT Bus and MTA Bus farebox revenue was unfavorable by $2 million due to lower average yield per passenger.

records.display_name: February electric power and fuel favorable variance
records.raw_text: Electric Power and Fuel costs were a combined $3 million favorable due to lower rates and usage

payload.description: To finance transit and commuter projects planned for early April

records.raw_text: an $800 million bond anticipation note sale to finance transit and commuter projects planned for early April

records.display_name: February operating expense spending favorable variance
records.raw_text: Operating expense spending was favorable by $61 million, or 2.2%.

records.display_name: February paratransit service contracts unfavorable variance

payload.description: Due to higher trip volume

records.raw_text: Paratransit Service Contracts were $18 million unfavorable due to higher trip volume

payload.description: Primarily due to vacancies and weather-related conditions

records.raw_text: Overtime was unfavorable by $45 million, primarily due to vacancies but also reflecting necessary response to weather-related conditions in February.
There was $9.5 million of Operating Expenses plus $2 million for mitigation accrual, bringing total expenses to $11.5 million
Non-Labor expenses were $56 million favorable

payload.description: Prompt Payment Annual Report 2024

records.raw_text: Interest payments amounting to $226,541.16 has or will be made for the January to December 2024 period.

records.display_name: Congestion Pricing revenue - peak vs off-peak

payload.raw_value_text: 95% of the Revenue is during peak hours

records.raw_text: 95% of the Revenue is during peak hours and 5% is from off-peak hours.

payload.description: Fares Not Collected rate

records.raw_text: Fares Not Collected on MNR was 2.2% in February, improved from 3.4% in January and down from 2.9% last February.

records.display_name: Congestion Pricing revenue share - for-hire vehicles and taxis
records.raw_text: 24% from for-hire vehicles and taxis

records.display_name: Congestion Pricing revenue share - buses and motorcycles
records.raw_text: 1% from buses and motorcycles

payload.description: Fares Not Collected rate

records.raw_text: Fares Not Collected on LIRR was 2.3% in February, improved from 4.3% in January and from 6.6% last February.
